issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases such as IPC failures or file system errors.
The instructions lack concrete code snippets or step-by-step procedures that can be directly executed.

scenarios.name: Secure file-picker IPC bridge
scenarios.rationale: Baseline enables nodeIntegration and uses the legacy send/reply pattern; treatment uses contextBridge.exposeInMainWorld plus ipcMain.handle/ipcRenderer.invoke with contextIsolation, sandbox, and CSP as the SKILL prescribes.

scenarios.name: Auto-update with GitHub Releases
scenarios.rationale: Baseline confuses the built-in autoUpdater with electron-updater and skips publish config; treatment configures electron-builder publish targets, electron-updater main-process flow, and a renderer progress/restart UI as documented.
